indications.text:
RAPIVAB is indicated for the treatment of acute uncomplicated influenza in patients 2 years and older
who have been symptomatic for no more than 2 days.
Limitations of Use:
 Efficacy of RAPIVAB is based on clinical trials of naturally occurring influenza in which the
predominant influenza infection...
